prompt: Workplan: implement 'hex docs llms-full' command emitting a single concatenated docs/llms-full.md containing all ADRs (docs/adrs/), specs (docs/specs/), workplan triage (docs/workplans/TRIAGE-*.md), and CLAUDE.md.
